headline: Walmart customers angered over new pricing change
summary: It’s simple: Whenever I have the time, I hit different supermarkets to make sure I’m getting every item at the lowest possible price. Tracking discounts has been a part of my normal routine for more than a decade. When I'm rushed, I must do all my shopping at one store but still look for the ...

headline: 96-year-old grocery chain acquires 18 stores from rival
summary: Small-town independent grocers have long served as the backbone of local communities, shaping regional identities and fostering customer loyalty that national chains often struggle to replicate. But today, the U.S. grocery landscape is undergoing a structural shift. Changing consumer behavior, ...

headline: RealReal Leadership Overhaul Puts Focus On Execution And Investor Expectations
summary: RealReal (NasdaqGS:REAL) has appointed Jennifer McKeehan to its Board of Directors. The company has also added Tiffany Stevenson as Chief People Officer and Tom Hanrahan as Chief Revenue Officer. The new leaders bring experience from companies including Fanatics, Walmart, Peloton, Weight Watchers and Square. RealReal is drawing fresh attention after a major leadership refresh that brings new oversight to both people and revenue functions. The appointments come with the share price at $8.64...

headline: Walmart digital price labels are coming to every store shelf in U.S. by end of 2026
summary: Walmart is rolling out digital shelf labels and expects it to be in all U.S. stores by year’s end. Is it surge pricing in disguise or just new tech efficiency?
